# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AbsorptionWetnessInfluence property

How strongly surface absorption influences reverb wetness.

`0.0` = absorption has no effect on wetness.

`1.0` = full physical effect.

```csharp
public float AbsorptionWetnessInfluence { get; set; }
```
